# Warden

Warden is a local code review CLI for TypeScript and JavaScript repos.

Primary pages:

- https://wrdn.beauty/
- https://wrdn.beauty/docs/
- https://wrdn.beauty/examples/
- https://wrdn.beauty/design/
- https://wrdn.beauty/notes/

The project emphasizes tool-backed findings, citable external verification, and model use as a
triage and writing layer rather than a source of ungrounded claims.
